proposal.hypothesis: Decrease kdAbduction by one bounded step.
proposal.expectedEffect: Test whether kdAbduction=3.07295 improves the complete locked quadruped score.

gateReasons: reset-d: survival 0.704 below gate without improving the current best
delay-60ms: survival 0.640 below gate without improving the current best
delay-plus-push: lateral drift 0.515 exceeds gate without improving the current best
delay-plus-reset: lateral drift 0.805 exceeds gate without improving the current best
